title: Early 2000s CCD Video Diary Storyboard AI
sourceTitle: Early 2000s Ccd Video Diary Storyboard AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Early-2000s Sony Cyber-shot CCD digicam video-diary storyboard for fictional adult East Asian office woman through one ordinary day, using tiny timestamp-style labels: MORNING, COMMUTE, OFFICE, NIGHT as tiny timestamp-style labels. Subject: fictional adult East Asian office woman through one ordinary day remains the same adult character across the diary sequence, with natural hair, real skin texture, soft expressions, small everyday emotions, and ordinary office-life presence. Scene: 4-panel vertical storyboard: mirror, bus commute, CRT office, family dinner, warm low-res texture defines the daily-life timeline, combining ordinary locations such as mirror, commute, CRT office, copy machine, lunch break, grocery stop, family dinner, and living room night. Composition: Fixed static storyboard adaptation of a 15-second diary: compact multi-panel or photo-strip layout, 4:3 CCD frames inside the vertical canvas, candid imperfect crops, timestamp overlays, REC UI, battery icon, AF focus brackets, and a final MEMORY FULL feeling. Signature Elements: Same adult office woman through one ordinary day, morning mirror, bus commute, CRT monitor, copy machine, lunch break, grocery stop, family dinner, living room TV glow, REC UI, timestamp, battery icon, AF brackets, and MEMORY FULL ending mood. Style: Fake early-2000s CCD digicam realism with Sony Cyber-shot look, direct flash, slight overexposure, CCD grain, compression noise, handheld shake impression, LCD texture, low-res warmth, and recovered-memory-card emotion. Color Palette: Warm faded home-video colors, direct-flash highlights, muted bus and office neutrals, CRT green-blue glow, grocery fluorescent tones, family-dinner warmth, and dark living-room TV light. Lighting: Imperfect consumer-camera lighting: direct flash, window light, bus reflections, office fluorescent light, copy-machine glow, convenience-store glare, dinner-table warmth, and TV glow at night. Camera: 4:3 compact digicam framing inside a vertical social canvas, low-res texture, candid off-center crops, autofocus brackets, timestamp/battery UI, and slightly unstable handheld diary perspective. Typography: tiny timestamp-style labels: MORNING, COMMUTE, OFFICE, NIGHT appears as tiny timestamp-style frame labels, REC overlays, date stamps, or small memory-card UI text; labels must stay short, readable, and integrated into the CCD interface. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
